about_text: I'm a French student in Web Development, and I am a front-end developer. I love turning ideas and projects into real websites. Passionate about web technologies, I can create attractive and functional user interfaces. My goal is to provide a smooth and enjoyable user experience while adhering to development best practices. I am always looking for new challenges and opportunities to learn and grow in this ever-changing field.
